reviews.review_description: Very Poor Now..Logon And Password means when they stop suporting it you will not be able to use it...Get Sky Player

reviews.review_title: Wish I could get a refund

reviews.review_description: It is impossible to create an account on Quest 3 nor in the PC web browser. The error messages are generic and meaningless. An account is needed to start the application, therefor it is fundamentally 100% broken and the fact that the app is still on the Meta store is a great mystery.

Before I purchased the Quest. I use this app everyday in my domintories. Is the only TV I got in my school days. It bring back my memories. 

Also it's the only cinema app that can reperduce the sound effect precisely while watching movie, cuz movie are designed for theater.
Like you won't not hear the deep bass or the surrounding sound if you watch it on regular phone or PC screen.
Also the ambient lighting play a big part of the movie experience.

Author I am so thankful for you making this application. I wish I could earn more so that I can support you.

1)Now there are some bugs there on the android version. Like, the seat will not be changed if there is no network or poor connection.
2)Also, the app lunches with a long time of black screen.
3)The app will be frozen if the video is not supported.
4)The volume level tends to return to the original status automatic.
No feature to disconnect or kick some of the prank user.

Cinevr is my favourite vr app. I use it all time on my quest 1 for watching movies. It has best theatre environment with best surround sound and spatial audio.

It's disappointing the latest version lacks few important features from previous version such as dynamic lighting. I have to sideload a previous version 2.50 which is the best in my opinion as it has great dynamic lighting and bots.

I have some bugs and features would like to see in latest:

1. Spatial audio and surround sound doesn't seem to be working on latest version?

2. Dynamic lighting is badly needed back. It runs ok on previous versions so no doubt you can enable it again.

3. Avatar bots in 2.50 version look best as they are darker and blend into the theatre better. Current bots are too bright and stand out.

4. Offline mode be nice to be able to still watch local videos offline. 

Thank you developers. It's a pain I can't give this version 5 🌟 as I love this app, but I hope you can take these changes into consideration and can get some time to work on the app again as it hasn't had any updates in awhile.

developer_response.body: Sorry if the app did not meet your expectations. Did you update the app with the last release ? What would you like to find out in CINEVR ?

reviews.review_description: Im using this app from a long time through side quest. However, this time i downloaded from the app store and it cant find any video stored in the headset. I then uninstalled and sideloaded through sidequest and it founded videos in my headset so there seems to be a bug with the app in the applab. Also it crashes if i have set the texture to 2048p. Sometimes it doesn't play videos..

developer_response.body:
Hello,
We recently updated the CINEVR application to improve the user experience and added new great videos. I hope that you will appreciate the new version ;-)
The Customer Service

reviews.review_description: Hi, the app has been broken for a very long time and still after the new update, its still broken. What the problem is, is the seating. The seating is at Shoulder Neck level instead of below the waistline to represent sitting on a seat. Right now, the seating is so high, that it covers part of the screen as so that you cannot watch anything at all because the seats in front are blocking your view... something has gone wrong with the programming in someway. The app is in its current state, unusable... the seating needs to be correctly lowered down to the correct height, as of right now the seat am supposed to be sitting on is directly right underneath my chin at neck height. Also am still very disappointed after so many years now, that your app still does not support LAN,,, so that I can stream my movie files directly from my PC computer... why ?. Even BIGSCREENVR has now added the option of watching DISNEY PLUS app and YouTube etc... why not CINEVR ???. ONE STAR because I cannot even use the app right now, its useless to me when its not even working correctly... can't exactly watch a film with my seat at shoulder neck height now, can i ?

developer_response.body: Sorry if the app. does not meet your expectations. Did you update CINEVR with the last release that should correct the bugs?

reviews.review_description: If i could i would give you 0 stars. Literally you can do nothing with this app. Files wont play from internal memory and smb shares never show up. To make things worse support dont reply to emails. Save yourself the time and dont bother even trying
